## We use cookies
This website uses cookies which may lead to the personal data processing. Please read our [Privacy Policy](https://sparrowquantum.com/privacy-policy/) to learn more about who we are, how you can contact us, how we process personal data and your user rights. By clicking ‘Accept all’, you accept the use of cookies. [About cookies](javascript:TogglePage\(this,%20'coiPage-3'\);) [Google privacy policy](https://policies.google.com/privacy)
Show details Hide details

Strictly necessary cookies help make a website navigable by activating basic functions such as page navigation and access to secure website areas. Without these cookies, the website would not be able to work properly.

## Cookie policy
**Your consent applies to the following domains:** sparrowquantum.com **The cookie policy was last updated on 15.06.2026**
### What is a cookie?
A cookie is a small data file stored in your computer, tablet or smartphone. A cookie is not a program that can contain harmful malware or virus.
### How our website uses cookies
Some cookies perform essential functions for our website. Cookies also help us get an overview of your visit to our website so we can continuously optimize and tailor the experience to your needs and interests. For example, cookies remember things like whether you have visited our website before; if you are logged in; and the specific language you prefer to see on the website. We also use cookies to target our ads specifically to you on other websites. In general, we use cookies as part of our service to present you with content that is as relevant to you as possible.
You can see the specific services that store cookies and why they do it, under the different categories:
  1. Functional
  2. Statistical
  3. Marketing


### How long are cookies stored?
The length of time a cookie is stored on your devices and browsers varies. The lifetime is calculated according to your last visit to the website. When a cookie expires, it is automatically deleted. All our cookies’ lifetimes are specified in our cookie policy.
### How can you manage cookies?
The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission. You can change or withdraw your consent to which cookies you would like to allow by clicking an icon in the bottom left corner of our website.
Additionally, you can clear cookies, prevent cookies, delete cookies and enable cookies at your will and for different circumstances. For details, visit [www.allaboutcookies.org](https://www.allaboutcookies.org/).
### Do you have any questions?
If you have any comments or questions relating to our information and/or processing of personal data, please feel welcome to contact us. The cookie policy itself is updated once a month by [Cookie Information](https://cookieinformation.com/). If you have any questions about our cookie policy, you are welcome to [contact Cookie Information on their website.](https://cookieinformation.com/)
Privacy Controls Accept all

[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69efbba8d6f82fd9c9c3299c_DSC02443.avif) Bio Love has a bachelor's in physics from Lund University, a MSc in quantum information science from the University of Copenhagen, and a PhD from the Niels Bohr Institute, where his work focused on photonic quantum information processing with quantum emitters. R&D Love Pettersson, PhD Quantum Photonics Scientist ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5e2ea691dfcd08a0a2a6_lucio.webp) Bio Lucio did his PhD at the University of Cambridge, where he worked on quantum magnetometry with spin sensors. He moved to the Niels Bohr Institute as a Marie Curie fellow focusing on optomechanics, before joining Sparrow Quantum as a quantum optics engineer. R&D Lucio Stefan, PhD Senior Quantum Photonics Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5e501475a566ac6dfecf_maria.webp) Bio Maria specializes in turning complex technologies into clear market narratives, leading brand, positioning, and GTM strategy for deep-tech companies. She combines global consultancy experience with hands-on roles in quantum software and AI scale-ups. Leadership Maria Genckel Chief Marketing Officer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69f0a4b1e581ca467e30b925_Matthias_gray%20background.jpg) Bio Matthias has a PhD in quantum photonics and did a postdoc in theoretical quantum information. At Sparrow, he develops theoretical architectures and building blocks for photonic quantum computing with quantum emitters such as quantum dots. R&D Matthias Löbl, PhD Quantum Photonics Scientist ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5eec52f18370405e8c1a_max.webp) Bio Maxime has a PhD from Denmark’s Technical University and research experience from McGill University in Montreal, CA. Max has worked at Sparrow since 2022, first as a quantum photonics engineer before moving to the business team as technical project lead. Business Maxime Bergamin, PhD Technical Project Lead ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5f10bc4f7dd8dcd6d0a2_ming-lai.webp) Bio Ming Lai joined Sparrow in 2024 as an industrial postdoc, with a PhD in quantum photonics at the Niels Bohr Institute. He is interested in developing entangled-photon sources and photonic quantum computing architectures for quantum emitters. R&D Ming Lai Chan, PhD Industrial Postdoc ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5f34d040ec5918688152_moritz.webp) Bio Moritz is a senior photonic quantum engineer dedicated to working on our integrated systems. He did his PhD and postdoc on single-photon emitters in two-dimensional materials at the Technical University of Denmark. Engineering Moritz Fischer, PhD Senior Quantum Photonics Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69efbc27642cca7c8b4a6ac5_DSC02146.avif) Bio Morten is responsible for installing critical lab infrastructure, overseeing development tasks, and ensuring we have the best tools available. Prior to joining Sparrow Quantum, he worked at the Niels Bohr Institute, Microsoft, and the Novo Foundation. Engineering Morten L. Jensen Laboratory Manager ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/6891ec193da6976420804e91_sparrow%20team%20placeholder%5B70%5D.png) Bio Nikolaj is currently pursuing a master's degree in quantum physics at the Niels Bohr Institute, specializing in quantum optics and advanced qubit technologies. His master's thesis will focus on 3D packaging for superconducting qubits. Engineering Nikolaj Strikart Nielsen Student Assistant ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5f65c6d58ae2084e0929_oliver.webp) Bio Oliver is a student assistant at Sparrow Quantum. With a background in project management, his focus lies in applied quantum systems and error correction. Oliver has also conducted award-winning independent research in computational chemistry. R&D Oliver Nørregaard Student Assistant ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69efbcd5a704ba1995349c9c_DSC02255.avif) Bio Oliver is a senior quantum research scientist at Sparrow Quantum and former postdoctoral researcher for the Niels Bohr Institute. With degrees from the Universities of Queensland and Copenhagen, Oliver also completed a one-year research fellowship at Harvard.  R&D Oliver Sandberg, PhD Senior Quantum Photonics Scientist ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69efbbccda941c67b0d6d56c_DSC02451.avif) Bio Oscar joined Sparrow as Numerical Modeling Engineer, with a MSc in materials engineering. His academic focus was on simulation and solid-state physics, which led to an interest in quantum computation. Engineering Oscar Törnquist Numerical Modeling Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69208db8dc86b46bc2126380_DSC00450.avif) Bio Patrik is an industrial PhD with a master's in electrical manufacturing and materials engineering from the Brno University of Technology. Prior to joining Sparrow, he worked as a FPGA Developer at the University of Vienna. R&D Patrik Zahálka Industrial PhD ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69208cfeb58a88d76f616190_DSC00528.avif) Bio Pol has a Bachelor's in Engineering Physics from UPC in Barcelona, and is currently a second year Master's student in Quantum Information Science at KU/DTU, focusing on quantum optics. R&D Pol Floriach Student assistant ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5f9a33a446982e709735_peter-2.webp) Bio Peter is a quantum physics professor at the Niels Bohr Institute. He has received numerous accolades, including ERC grants, Elite Forsk Award, and many more. Peter founded Sparrow Quantum and co-leads the company as Chief Quantum Officer. Leadership Prof. Peter Lodahl Founder & Chief Quantum Officer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5fb466f98a56240b47fd_rasmus.webp) Bio Rasmus is a senior quantum photonic engineer and accomplished programmer. He holds multiple degrees from the Technical University of Denmark, with exchange stints at TU München, UC Berkeley, and McGill.  R&D Rasmus H. Jensen, PhD Senior Quantum Photonics Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5fca09c00f5fe241ce54_severin.webp) Bio After his master’s in Applied Solid State Physics at Ruhr University Bochum, Severin joined Sparrow in 2023. He is dedicated to further optimizing the fabrication of pristine semiconductor quantum dots for single-photon source applications. R&D Severin Krüger Industrial PhD ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5ff5168264da79e27577_sissel-2.webp) Bio Sissel is a quantum business developer with a PhD in quantum opto-mechanics from Denmark’s Technical University. Sissel has worked for Sparrow since 2023, first co-leading the Optical Characterisation Team but now focusing on business development. Business Sissel Bay Nielsen, PhD Quantum Business Developer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69208d1b46f1ee48779f8589_DSC00594.avif) Bio Sophia is pursuing a master's in quantum information science at Copenhagen University and the Technical University of Denmark. She focuses on reviewing papers that explain the underlying theory behind grating couplers and running simulations accordingly. Engineering Sophia Carmen Simon Student Assistant ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/6891ec193da6976420804e91_sparrow%20team%20placeholder%5B70%5D.png) Bio Søren is an attorney-at-law and E*MBA with 25 years of experience as commercial lawyer. Søren worked with Sparrow for many years as an external lawyer on a case-by-case basis before joining as External General Counsel in August 2025. Business Søren Holmark External General Counsel ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69208d8d0aa8c7fdfaa1de8d_DSC00700.avif) Bio Stylianos holds a Master's of Science in Quantum Physics from the University of Copenhagen. He is an industrial PhD at Sparrow Quantum, focusing on characterizing and optimizing our fiber-coupled single-photon source. R&D Stylianos Karalis Industrial PhD ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/6891ec193da6976420804e91_sparrow%20team%20placeholder%5B70%5D.png) Bio A theoretical physicist specializing in quantum error correction and fault-tolerant photonic architectures, Susan joins Sparrow as a Quantum Logic Scientist alongside her PhD at the Niels Bohr Institute and the University of Bristol. R&D Susan Chen Quantum Logic Scientist ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69208d74a1dd7e131a0e52f9_DSC00419.avif) Bio Tom is a quantum photonics engineer at Sparrow Quantum, with a master's degree in physics from the University of Bielefeld. At Sparrow, he is specializing in feedback systems and FPGA programming. R&D Tom Kenzo Kronsbein Quantum Photonics Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69208d5b8745ea2b85be5777_DSC00393.avif) Bio Vicenç is an electronics engineer focused on having our integrated systems perform seamlessly. With a bachelor's and a master's in electronics, he brings expertise in cross-disciplinary hardware system integration. Engineering Vicenç Palmero Arans Electronics Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/6891ec193da6976420804e91_sparrow%20team%20placeholder%5B70%5D.png) Bio Victor has a MSc in International Business & Politics from Copenhagen Business School, completing his studies with a thesis on the EU’s efforts to develop quantum capabilities. Prior to joining Sparrow, he worked as EA to the Tech Ambassador of Denmark. Business Victor Fuhrmann Desimpelaere Executive Assistant to CQO ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/69efbb892795ae3e05becb59_DSC02475.avif) Bio Vikas has a PhD in photonics from ICFO, Barcelona, and was a postdoctoral researcher at the University of Innsbruck leading a quantum dot research subgroup that developed well-known optical excitation schemes for quantum dot photon sources before joining us. Engineering Vikas Remesh, PhD Senior Scientist Lead ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/6891ec193da6976420804e91_sparrow%20team%20placeholder%5B70%5D.png) Bio Vojtech is studying electrical engineering, currently pursuing a T.I.M.E. double master's degree at DTU and Vrije Universiteit Brussel. In 2023, he founded a tutoring company as a student entrepreneur in Belgium, where he worked prior to joining Sparrow. R&D Vojtech De Coninck Student Assistant ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c5d0f744012bd98fed692_jing.webp) Bio Jing is an experienced nanofabrication process engineer, developing our GaAs photonic integrated circuit cleanroom processing and design along with high-quality photonic components. She was a Quantum Measurement Engineer at Microsoft before joining Sparrow. Engineering Xiaojing (Jing) Zhao, PhD Senior Nanofabrication Process Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539dfb/673c601d09991d2e63d656fc_zhe.webp) Bio Zhe is an experienced fabrication engineer with a PhD from the IOP-CAS, China. Zhe has been working on quantum photonics chip fabrication and development at the Niels Bohr Institute since 2017. He joined Sparrow Quantum as a research consultant in 2022. R&D Zhe Liu, PhD Senior Nanofabrication Process Engineer ](https://sparrowquantum.com/team)

Cookie policy

Your consent applies to the following domains: sparrowquantum.com The cookie policy was last updated on 15.06.2026

What is a cookie?

A cookie is a small data file stored in your computer, tablet or smartphone. A cookie is not a program that can contain harmful malware or virus.

How our website uses cookies

Some cookies perform essential functions for our website. Cookies also help us get an overview of your visit to our website so we can continuously optimize and tailor the experience to your needs and interests. For example, cookies remember things like whether you have visited our website before; if you are logged in; and the specific language you prefer to see on the website. We also use cookies to target our ads specifically to you on other websites. In general, we use cookies as part of our service to present you with content that is as relevant to you as possible.

You can see the specific services that store cookies and why they do it, under the different categories:

  1. Functional
  2. Statistical
  3. Marketing

 

How long are cookies stored?

The length of time a cookie is stored on your devices and browsers varies. The lifetime is calculated according to your last visit to the website. When a cookie expires, it is automatically deleted. All our cookies’ lifetimes are specified in our cookie policy.

How can you manage cookies?

The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission. You can change or withdraw your consent to which cookies you would like to allow by clicking an icon in the bottom left corner of our website.

Additionally, you can clear cookies, prevent cookies, delete cookies and enable cookies at your will and for different circumstances. For details, visit www.allaboutcookies.org.

Do you have any questions?

If you have any comments or questions relating to our information and/or processing of personal data, please feel welcome to contact us. The cookie policy itself is updated once a month by Cookie Information. If you have any questions about our cookie policy, you are welcome to contact Cookie Information on their website.

    Bio

    Abdulmalik is a quantum photonics engineer at Sparrow. He has a PhD in Electrical and Photonics Engineering from the Technical University of Denmark, where his research focused on developing solid-state semiconductor-quantum-dot-based single-photon sources.
